title: I would love to change the color of dropdown options/selections
excerpt: Hi, this might be more of a function request because I can’t see where to do it, but it would be great if we could color-code dropdown selections, so they are easier to spot. I was using Status because of the colors, but…

posts.author: MaryV (Mary Vogt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, this might be more of a function request because I can’t see where to do it, but it would be great if we could color-code dropdown selections, so they are easier to spot. I was using Status because of the colors, but it’s not appropriate for some of my columns (esp. where I want to select more than one thing). I think it would be helpful to have the option. Thank you.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this! Emoji support would also be welcome.

posts.author: carolinechisolm (Caroline Chisolm)
posts.cookedHtml: It would also be great to be able to assign the same colors to multiple dropdowns. For instance, we currently have a dropdown column for client and I would love to categorize the “type” of client (e.g., federal gov, state gov, commercial) using color.

posts.author: RussellKatz (Russell Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that this feature would be very helpful! If I want to customize the colors I am forced to use the Status column but oftentimes the Dropdown column is more relevant. I have to avoid using the Dropdown column until this feature is added.
